creator: shinjii@virusinfo.rdksupportinc.com
text:
I to am getting the crashing of firefox when trying to save multiple files 
within 1 session.  It has only been since the upgrade to FF 2.0 .. my entire 
ports tree is up to date and is updated frequently. F simply hangs when it 
gets to this state then closes it'self off.

Being as my .core file is 50meg if anyone wishes to look at it, it can be 
obtained via this site.. http://shinjitsu.no-ip.org/ff.core
